scripts.openapi:export: mkdir -p openapi && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml --bin axon-openapi > openapi/axon.json
scripts.openapi:generate: npm run openapi:export && npm run openapi:types
scripts.openapi:check: npm run openapi:generate && git diff --exit-code openapi/axon.json lib/generated/axon-api.ts
